ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_amnt" REAL /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "funded_amnt" REAL /* Amount funded by the investor */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Loan term in months */,
  "int_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the loan based on borrower risk */,
  "sub_grade" TEXT /* Sub-grade of the loan for finer categorization */,
  "emp_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment of the borrower in years */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the borrower */,
  "annual_inc" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the borrower's information */,
  "issue_d" TEXT /* Date when the loan was issued */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., credit card, car) */,
  "addr_state" TEXT /* State where the borrower resides */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Active, Paid Off, Defaulted) */,
  "loan_product" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., Personal, Auto, Credit Card) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was approved */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  "next_payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next payment is due */,
  "overdue_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan that is currently overdue */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance of the loan */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee charged if the payment is overdue */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the borrower who applied for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "emp_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment of the borrower in years */,
  "annual_inc" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the borrower */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the borrower's information */,
  "addr_state" TEXT /* State where the borrower resides */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the borrower */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent) of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the borrower */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the borrower started their current employment */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower's current employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the borrower */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the borrower */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the borrower has */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, overdue) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was due */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Late fee charged for the payment if it was overdue */,
  "principal_paid" REAL /* Principal amount paid in the payment */,
  "interest_paid" REAL /* Interest amount paid in the payment */,
  "late_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the payment was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower associated with the credit score */,
  "fico_range_low" INTEGER /* Lowest FICO score range */,
  "fico_range_high" INTEGER /* Highest FICO score range */,
  "last_fico_range_low" INTEGER /* Lowest FICO score range of the last check */,
  "last_fico_range_high" INTEGER /* Highest FICO score range of the last check */,
  "credit_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was last checked */,
  "credit_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the credit report (if available) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Single FICO score for the borrower */,
  "credit_score_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit score (e.g., TransUnion, Experian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan whose status is being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Fully Paid, Charged Off) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the loan before the current update */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., Payment received, Defaulted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
